name: Name
nameHint: How you appear in the app
interfaceLanguageHint: The language the app speaks to you in

ai.missingBody: Without it the core feature doesn't work: translating words by tapping them in the reader, nor filling cards with phonetics, examples and synonyms. Get one free below (takes a minute).
ai.explanation: AI translates the words you tap while reading, fills in their cards (definition, example, phonetics, synonyms, CEFR level) and looks up your books' data. Pick a service and paste its key; it is only stored in your browser, never on our server.
